mapper.insert: insert into user_profile(user_id, interest_tags, study_preference, active_time, update_time) values(#{userId}, #{interestTags}, #{studyPreference}, #{activeTime},#{updateTime})
mapper.update: update user_profile set interest_tags=#{interestTags}, study_preference=#{studyPreference}, active_time=#{activeTime}, update_time=#{updateTime} where user_id=#{userId}
